sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44145" key="eu)/istos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔιστος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πόθος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, desire <sense id="n44145.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of knowledge</tr_>, Epigr. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.14c</biblScope> </bibl> (leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐκταῖον</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
